use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING NOCTURIA DUE TO NOCTURNAL POLYURIA IN ADULTS

TREATMENT OF NOCTURIA DUE TO NOCTURNAL POLYURIA IN ADULTS WHO AWAKEN AT LEAST 2 TIMES PER NIGHT TO VOID BY INDUCING AN ANTIDIURETIC EFFECT BY INTRANASALLY ADMINISTERING A PLUME OF DROPLETS COMPRISING A DOSE OF ABOUT 0.05-5 MCG DESMOPRESSIN

TREATMENT OF NOCTURIA DUE TO NOCTURNAL POLYURIA IN ADULTS WHO AWAKEN AT LEAST 2 TIMES PER NIGHT TO VOID BY INTRANASALLY ADMINISTERING A PLUME OF DROPLETS COMPRISING A DOSE OF 0.75 MCG OR 1.5 MCG DESMOPRESSIN

indications.text:
NOCTIVA is indicated for the treatment of nocturia due to nocturnal polyuria in adults who awaken at least 2 times per night to void.
Nocturnal polyuria was defined in the NOCTIVA clinical trials as night-time urine production exceeding one-third of the 24-hour
urine production.
